strengths: Proven process improvements with quantified impact
Experience with reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau, Excel)
Relevant degree and data analytics certification
weaknesses: Limited explicit IT systems integration experience
Title mismatch (Data Analyst/Developer vs Jr IT BA)
Shorter tenure in formal BA roles
Hybrid role experience not explicitly stated
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional teams at Haven Technologies to perform Business Analysis, gathering requirements from product and UI/UX stakeholders to align IT infrastructure with business objectives.
Led Business Process Improvement initiatives at Shine Masters, automating manual scheduling and intake workflows to drive operational efficiency and digital transformation.
Integrated diverse data sources and legacy IT systems by building unified schemas in PostgreSQL, ensuring seamless communication between IT technical stacks and business reporting tools.

Demonstrated ability to thrive in hybrid and remote-work environments by managing complex documentation, JIRA workflows, and team communication independently while meeting strict project delivery deadlines.

Applied foundational principles of business analysis to translate complex technical data into actionable IT business solutions, bridging the gap between technical teams and non-technical stakeholders.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, Asta CRS, Inc., Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Jr IT Business Analyst opportunity with Asta CRS, Inc. I am interested in this opportunity because of Asta CRS's proven 20-year history of delivering intelligent, industry-driven IT solutions that increase business agility. What interests me about working for Asta CRS is its customer-focused approach to technical consulting, which resonates with my own background in bridging the gap between data-driven insights and operational success. I believe my technical business analysis proficiency and my cross-functional collaboration skills would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on the intersection of technical capability and business value. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in manual intake processes, analyzed the workflow requirements, and implemented a Zapier-based automation solution. This initiative reduced processing time by 40% and reallocated eight hours per week back to lead generation, demonstrating my ability to improve business processes directly. Ultimately, I know that the Jr IT Business Analyst role at Asta CRS would allow me to bring my analytical skills to gather and document comprehensive business requirements for your global partners. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my IT systems integration skills. In this capacity, I collaborated with Underwriting and Product teams to clean and reconcile insurance testing data using advanced SQL, which improved data accuracy by 30% and facilitated more reliable cross-departmental reporting. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my experience with SQL, Python, and process modeling in working on technology-driven business solutions at Asta CRS. I know that my analytical rigor and communication skills align with what it takes to succeed in the Jr IT Business Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
